description: Enhance your rental car experience with unlimited Wi-Fi from TravelTab Adventurer, enjoy over 150 channels with SiriusXM Satellite Radio, get where you’re going with GPS navigation and keep your kids safe with the LATCH seat belt system for car seats

i18n.bookingWidget.discount.code.notVerified: Your coupon can't be used for this reservation.
i18n.bookingWidget.discount.code.popup.notPre:
Your coupon number cannot be used for this reservation due to following reason(s):

  • The coupon entered is invalid.
i18n.bookingWidget.discount.code.popup.notVal: Your coupon number cannot be used for this reservation due to following reason: The coupon code entered is not valid. Coupon codes are 7 characters, 4 letters followed by 3 numbers
i18n.bookingWidget.discount.code.popup.notVer:
Your coupon number cannot be used for this reservation due to following reason(s):

  • YOUR COUPON MUST BE REDEEMED AT THE COUNTER

    This coupon will not be reflected online. To redeem your reward, please present your paper coupon at the rental counter.

    Some advance reservations are required. If this is noted in the terms and your coupon is associated to an AWD, please enter this AWD with this reservation to ensure you receive proper adjustments at time of pick-up.

    Please check your coupon for the full Terms and Conditions. Blackout dates may apply, and we recommend that you contact the rental location to confirm that the coupon may be used for the dates you have reserved.

contentcardelement.headline: Mobile Wi-Fi
contentcardelement.bodyContent: Reserve a Mobile Wi-Fi device that offers connectivity for up to 5 devices, navigation, international calling and access to top apps for streaming media and gaming.

contentcardelement_821372053.headline: SiriusXM Radio
contentcardelement_821372053.bodyContent: With SiriusXM available in most Avis vehicles, you'll enjoy commercial-free music from nearly every genre, all your favorite sports including every MLB® and NHL® game, exclusive talk and entertainment, news, comedy and more.

contentcardelement_660599494.headline: GPS Navigation
contentcardelement_660599494.bodyContent: GPS Navigation lets you find every destination with ease. Look up addresses & attractions at the touch of a button on your rental car GPS unit. Pair with your mobile device's bluetooth for hands-free calling.

contentcardelement_820063894.headline: Child Safety Seats
contentcardelement_820063894.bodyContent: Avis offers Child Safety Seats and Baby seats for all ages that follow LATCH, a Federal Motor Vehicle Safety standard compliant system.

footerlegal.legalText: © 2026 Avis Rent A Car System, LLC
